prompt:
Goal: Create a luxury dark promotional merchandise flyer for Kakashima Hikari Official Fanclub Fan Meeting 2026, styled like an elegant Japanese fan club goods announcement. The design should look like a single finished advertisement image with all product information visible at a glance.

Canvas: Landscape 16:10 flyer, approximately 1054×768 px. Use a black and charcoal background with warm gold highlights, lace ornaments, ribbons, pearl-like light orbs, and a refined vintage boutique atmosphere. Add thin gold borders and slightly aged cream product panels.

Main visual: Place one large glamour portrait of a young woman in a black sleeveless dress at center-right, seated or leaning with long dark wavy hair, softly lit, with her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. Use warm studio lighting and a dark brown/black backdrop.

Header and title area: Upper left contains an oval floral crest logo, cursive Roman text, and a large elegant serif headline reading Kakashima Hikari Official Fanclub Fan Meeting 2026. Below it, add a beige ribbon banner with Japanese text 限定グッズ. Decorative lace should appear in the top-left corner and along the bottom edge.

Layout: Arrange exactly 5 product panels around the main portrait, each with cream-gray paper texture, thin gold trim, small ribbon or price badges, and Japanese product names.

Product panel count and contents:
1. T-shirt panel, bottom-left: label Tシャツ, size text “M / L / XL”, one white T-shirt mockup with a printed rectangular photo graphic on the chest, a speech bubble saying the design is simple and good for everyday use, and a gold price badge “¥4,950”.
2. Photo set panel, lower center: label “フォトセット”, show exactly 6 sample photo thumbnails arranged in a 2-row collage, divided into vertical set and horizontal set labels, with large translucent “SAMPLE” text stamped over several thumbnails, a speech bubble saying 3 random photos out of 6 total are included, and a gold price badge “¥1,100”.
3. Tapestry panel, upper-right: label “タペストリー”, sublabel “A2サイズ”, show one A2 wall-hanging tapestry mockup with the same woman’s portrait, hanging from a black rod and string, a circular note saying it is a large A2 tapestry to decorate a room, and a gold price badge “¥4,400”.
4. Mug panel, mid-right: label “マグカップ”, show one black-handled mug with a portrait print on the side, and a gold price badge “¥2,200”.
5. Acrylic stand panel, lower-right: label “アクリルスタンド”, show exactly 2 stand components: one small white base plate and one full-body acrylic stand of the woman sitting on a wooden stool in a black dress and heels, with a gold price badge “¥2,750”.

Bottom information bar: Across the bottom, add a dark band with Japanese sales period label “販売期間” and large gold date text 5月25日（月）18:00 ～ 6月2日（火）23:59. Add tiny fine-print Japanese disclaimer text underneath, very small and subtle.

Visual style: Elegant Japanese idol merchandise flyer, premium black and gold palette, serif typography mixed with cursive script, soft vignetting, glowing bokeh, lace flourishes, curled gold ribbon accents, and polished commercial layout. Keep product panels crisp and readable, with realistic mockups but slightly stylized lighting.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 product panels and exactly 6 photo thumbnails in the photo set. Keep all faces softly blurred or obscured. Do not add extra products, extra dates, watermarks, QR codes, or social media icons.
